name: Saraswati Niwas - B1 Branch
description: Secure, fully managed student stay located in Alpha 2, Greater Noida. Features spacious rooms, premium utilities, daily cleaning, and biometric security systems.
longDescription: Saraswati Niwas - B1 Branch is our premium boys' accommodation located in Sector Alpha 2. Known for its peaceful academic environment, this hostel is a preferred choice for students looking for high-quality furnished rooms and an excellent study-friendly atmosphere.

The branch is equipped with a modern mess serving 4 freshly prepared vegetarian meals daily, a high-speed unlimited fiber Wi-Fi network (200 Mbps), and a 24/7 power backup system to ensure you are never disconnected from your online academic classes.

Safety is highly prioritized here with round-the-clock CCTV cameras, automated biometric entrance gates, and a professional on-site warden who is always available to handle security and general student queries.
facilitiesDetails: Furnished rooms with premium study table, wardrobe, and ergonomic chair setup.
200 Mbps unlimited optical-fiber Wi-Fi network access.
24/7 geysers and hot water supply in all bathrooms.
Daily professional housekeeping and deep bathroom sanitization twice a week.

rules: Gates close strictly at 10:30 PM. Late entries require warden authorization.
Parent/Guardian entry is permitted in the reception and lounge between 10:00 AM - 7:00 PM.
Overnight guests/friends are not allowed in student rooms.
Loud music/disturbances are prohibited in the quiet study zones.
Smoking, alcohol, and prohibited substances are strictly banned.

name: Saraswati Niwas - B10 Branch
description: Premium boys' hostel situated in Knowledge Park 3, close to major institutions. Offers modern workspaces, robust internet, gym access, and professional catering.
longDescription: Saraswati Niwas - B10 Branch is our flagship boys' residence located in Knowledge Park 3. Designed specifically for university students, it offers premium lifestyle infrastructure including shared gym space, dedicated study halls, and high-quality double and single sharing options.
Located just a few minutes away from major institutes like GL Bajaj and KCC, it minimizes commute time, allowing students to focus more on their college curriculum and projects.

Meals are curated with a high-nutrition weekly rotating menu. The building features complete biometric security gates, professional security guards on 24/7 rotation, and high-speed Wi-Fi throughout all rooms.
facilitiesDetails: In-house physical fitness gym setup with basic weights and treadmills.
Dedicated, quiet study lounge on the ground floor with high-speed internet ports.
Automatic biometric scanners and digital access cards for students.
Complete 24/7 power backup including AC systems during summer months.

rules: Hostel gates close at 10:30 PM. Late entries are strictly monitored.
Biometric attendance registration is mandatory twice a day (morning and night).
Guests are not allowed inside student rooms without written warden permission.
Gym timings are structured to separate student batches and maintain hygiene.
Zero tolerance policy for drugs, alcohol, or smoking inside the premises.

name: Saraswati Niwas - B16 Branch
description: Vibrant student residence in Knowledge Park 3. Fully managed hostel with nutritious food menus, reliable backup utilities, and 24/7 security services.
longDescription: Saraswati Niwas - B16 Branch offers comfortable, cost-effective student accommodations in Knowledge Park 3. It features double and triple occupancy rooms designed with optimal study spaces and private cabinets.
The mess is highly popular for its home-style cooking and hygienic preparation, offering 4 vegetarian meals daily. Weekly laundry services and daily housekeeping keep the campus clean and organized.
With high-speed Wi-Fi connectivity and robust power backup systems, this branch provides everything a student needs to achieve academic success without worrying about daily chores.
facilitiesDetails: Spacious rooms with individual beds, study tables, and wardrobe locks.
Optical fiber Wi-Fi access throughout the property.
Filtered RO drinking water plants installed on all floors.
Housekeeping cleaning service every morning.

Any damage to hostel property will be charged directly to the security deposit.

name: Saraswati Niwas - B17 Branch (Girls)
description: Ultra-secure girls' hostel located near IIT Extension, KCC, and GL Bajaj campuses. Featuring 3-tier biometric gates, full-time wardens, study rooms, and robust CCTV networks.
longDescription: Saraswati Niwas - B17 Girls Branch is our premier, highly secure accommodation for girls, strategically located near the IIT Extension and major college campuses in Knowledge Park 3. It sets the highest standard for student safety and luxury living.

The building is protected by a 3-tier security grid, including digital biometric gates, professional female security guards on 24/7 duty, and resident female wardens. The campus features dedicated quiet study lounges, an indoor gym, and recreation spaces.

Residents enjoy a daily rotating mess menu of nutritious, hygienic vegetarian food, unlimited 200 Mbps Wi-Fi, and weekly laundry service. This branch provides parents with complete peace of mind while supporting students' academic success.
facilitiesDetails: 3-tier biometric security gates with automated SMS notifications to parents.
Resident female wardens and 24/7 security guards.
Indoor fitness studio/gym exclusive for female residents.
Quiet, air-conditioned study hall with high-speed internet terminals.

Housekeeping staff will clean rooms daily between 10:00 AM - 1:00 PM.

name: Saraswati Niwas - AR1 Branch
description: Fully furnished boys' hostel located in the heart of Knowledge Park 3, Namoli area. Offering structured study layouts, recreation spaces, and high-quality mess menus.
longDescription: Saraswati Niwas - AR1 Branch is our premium boys' accommodation located in the Knowledge Park 3 area. Designed with modern architecture, this branch caters to students from nearby engineering and management colleges.

Rooms are clean, bright, and fully furnished with custom cabinets, modern study tables, and geyser-equipped bathrooms. High-speed internet (200 Mbps) is available in all areas to support online projects and study sessions.
A healthy, balanced mess menu offers 4 meals a day. Security is managed by guards on a 24/7 schedule, biometric gate access, and high-definition CCTV coverage.
facilitiesDetails: Premium wooden furniture including beds, writing tables, and storage closets.
High-speed fiber-optic Wi-Fi network setup.
Hygienic vegetarian mess serving 4 daily meals.
Continuous power backup with automatic diesel generator systems.

name: Saraswati Niwas - AR2 Branch (Girls)
description: Comfortable and secure girls' hostel branch in Knowledge Park 3. Provides clean room servicing, dedicated security patrols, nutritious meals, and high-speed internet.
longDescription: Saraswati Niwas - AR2 Girls Branch offers a safe, peaceful, and fully-managed residency option for female students in Knowledge Park 3. Built around a private courtyard layout, this branch boasts a high sense of community and security.
Female security personnel manage the entrance and biometric check-ins round the clock. Highly hygienic food, daily cleaning, and weekly laundry service are fully handled by in-house teams.
Rooms are spacious, air-conditioned, and feature dedicated study desks, geysers, and robust Wi-Fi connections, creating an excellent workspace for students.
facilitiesDetails: Secure biometric digital locks and female guards on 24/7 rotation.
Spacious rooms with private lockers, closets, and desks.
Unlimited 200 Mbps fiber internet access.
Dedicated resident wardens to support health and emergency needs.
